"I saw Principal (校長先生) looking down. I wonder if something
happened? They usually seem more energetic..."
"The old school building seems to have been noisy lately, but it's
actually dangerous, you know?"
"If I'm already in a tattered state, there is a high possibility of
getting injured. And if there are strange people gathering, the level
of danger will only increase."
"You have to be careful not to get too close to dangerous places,
okay?"
"It seems like various people come and go in the Western-style
mansion, but it's dangerous, so it's better not to approach, okay?"
"I don't hear many good rumors, you know. But you shouldn't take
rumors lightly. It's best to be cautious and be on guard."
"An abandoned building is just the kind of place where delinquents
would want to gather, isn't it?"
"The building itself is dangerous, and having delinquents around is
even more dangerous."
"We must make sure to enforce that the students do not approach."
"I think it's inconvenient to gather in places like abandoned
factories. I believe there are various dangerous machines there too."
"Well, maybe that's why ordinary people tend to stay away."
"I think it's safer not to approach anyway because it's dangerous."
"I wonder what they're plotting, gathering in the abandoned warehouse.
Well, it's highly unlikely that they're thinking of something good."
"You know it's dangerous, so you have to be careful, okay?"
"It seems like bad children are gathering at the abandoned hospital."
"Isn't it dangerous to go to such places?"
<Minimap:person1>
"Lately, the two of them, Mr. Miura, the physical education teacher,
and Mr. Yamamoto, the vice principal, seem to get along well with
Principal-san."
"Even though they don't seem to click at first glance, they
actually get along well and have a good relationship."
"Envious, yet not so... Well, maybe those three have
something going on."
<Minimap:person0>
"Oh, oh my...? That's strange. There should be documents here."
"I can't find them... I wonder where they went?"
